name: Strong application materials
explanation: The student has a completed and tailored resume, a professional profile, and at least one supporting application document.

name: Weak application materials
explanation: A missing resume is a critical application material gap.

name: Application materials are acceptable
explanation: The student has a resume and at least one additional professional application signal.

name: Supporting documents are prepared
explanation: The student has prepared a cover letter and academic documents for internship applications.

name: Strong project portfolio
conclusion_text: Project and portfolio readiness is high
explanation: The student has project evidence, can explain the work, and has a stronger public portfolio signal.

name: No project evidence
conclusion_text: Project and portfolio readiness is low
explanation: No related project means the student lacks evidence for technical or applied ability.

name: Project explanation is strong
explanation: The student can explain the project goal, technical implementation, and technical decisions clearly.

name: Project explanation needs improvement
explanation: The student has a project but cannot yet explain it clearly enough for interviews.

name: Portfolio needs improvement
explanation: The student has a project but lacks a visible GitHub, portfolio, or showcase.

name: Technical readiness is high
explanation: The student has programming basics, tool knowledge, problem-solving ability, and role-related concepts.

name: Technical readiness is medium
explanation: The student has some technical foundation but does not yet satisfy all high-readiness signals.

name: Technical readiness is low
explanation: Weak technical foundation is a major blocker for software, AI, or data internships.

name: AI or data role technical signal
conclusion_text: AI, data, or software concept readiness is present
explanation: The student understands relevant concepts and can connect them to problem solving or data/database basics.

name: Interview readiness is high
explanation: The student has practiced technical and behavioral interviews, uses STAR, completed mock practice, and can explain projects.

name: Interview readiness is medium
explanation: The student has practiced some internship interview questions but has not completed all high-readiness interview activities.

name: Interview readiness is low
explanation: The student has not prepared for internship interviews.

name: Behavioral interview preparation is present
explanation: The student has practiced behavioral questions and uses the STAR method.

name: Career direction is clear
explanation: The student knows a target role, compared job descriptions, researched companies, and understands required skills.

name: Career direction is partly clear
explanation: The student has a target direction but still needs stronger job description matching or requirement analysis.

name: Career direction is unclear
explanation: The student has not clearly identified a target internship role.

name: Company research is sufficient
conclusion_text: Company and job research is sufficient
explanation: The student has researched companies and compared job descriptions.

name: Application action is active
explanation: The student has already applied to at least five companies.

name: Application action has started
conclusion_text: Application action has started but is still limited
explanation: The student has applied to fewer than five companies.

name: No application action yet
explanation: The student has not applied to any companies yet.

name: Application tracking is good
conclusion_text: Application tracking and follow-up are good
explanation: The student tracks applications and either follows up or has an active application pipeline.

name: Work readiness is strong
conclusion_text: Soft skills and work readiness are strong
explanation: The student has experience, communication skill, and teamwork/time-management evidence.

name: Professional profile prepared
explanation: The student has a resume and LinkedIn or another professional profile.

name: High internship readiness
explanation: Core preparation areas are strong: materials, portfolio, technical skills, interview preparation, and career direction.

name: Medium internship readiness
explanation: The student has a usable foundation but still has gaps before full readiness.

name: Low internship readiness from weak materials and technical preparation
explanation: Both application materials and technical readiness are low.

name: Low internship readiness from missing project, weak technical preparation, and unclear direction
explanation: Project evidence, technical readiness, and career direction are all weak.

name: Ready to apply now
explanation: The student is prepared across major areas and has an active, tracked application process.

name: Need to improve technical preparation first
conclusion_text: Need to improve technical preparation first
explanation: Technical readiness is low, so foundations should be strengthened before broad applications.

name: Need to improve application materials first
conclusion_text: Need to improve application materials first
explanation: Application materials or project evidence are too weak, so resume, supporting materials, and portfolio evidence should be prepared first.

name: Need interview preparation before applying
explanation: The student needs interview preparation before attending interviews.

name: Need to clarify target role first
conclusion_text: Need to clarify target role first
explanation: Career direction is unclear, so the student should identify a target role and compare requirements.

name: Need to improve project explanation
explanation: The student has a project but cannot yet explain the goal or implementation clearly.

name: Need to improve application progress
explanation: The student should improve application volume, tracking, follow-up, or job-description-based application preparation.

name: Portfolio recommendation
explanation: A visible project showcase can help communicate project evidence to recruiters and interviewers.

name: Resume tailoring recommendation
conclusion_text: Tailor resume for the target internship
explanation: A completed resume should be adjusted to the target role and job requirements.

name: Application action recommendation
explanation: The student appears prepared enough to build a stronger application pipeline.

name: Interview practice recommendation
conclusion_text: Practice technical and behavioral interview questions
explanation: Interview practice is required before the student can confidently communicate readiness.

name: Technical foundation recommendation
conclusion_text: Strengthen programming and role-related technical basics
explanation: Weak technical foundation should be addressed with focused practice and explainable projects.

name: Career direction recommendation
conclusion_text: Clarify target role and compare job requirements
explanation: Clear role direction helps the student choose relevant skills, projects, and resume keywords.

name: Project explanation recommendation
explanation: The student should practice explaining project goals, implementation, challenges, and results.

name: Application tracking is missing
explanation: The student has applied, but does not track application status systematically.

name: Application follow-up is missing
explanation: The student has applied, but does not send follow-up emails when appropriate.

name: Job description review before applying is missing
conclusion_text: Job description review before applying is missing
explanation: The student should compare job descriptions before deciding where and how to apply.

name: Start applying recommendation
explanation: The student has not applied yet, so the next step is to begin applying to suitable companies.

name: Application tracker recommendation
explanation: A tracking sheet can help the student record company, role, date, and application outcome.

name: Follow-up recommendation
conclusion_text: Send polite follow-up emails when appropriate
explanation: Polite follow-up messages can improve professionalism and help manage application progress.

name: Review job descriptions recommendation
explanation: Comparing job descriptions helps the student target better-matched roles before applying.
